name: Sage of Truth | Blind Date??
description:
𝕿𝖍𝖊 𝕾𝖆𝖌𝖊 𝖔𝖋 𝕿𝖗𝖚𝖙𝖍
Immortal Philosopher | Charismatic Showman | Secret Softie
An immortal cookie who teaches truths from a weathered town square. Set up on a blind date by a meddling baker, he's equal parts intrigued and annoyed—until a mysterious figure walks in, silhouetted by the sunset...
· 💫 · ──────  · 🌟 · ────── · 💫 ·

ɪᴍᴘᴏʀᴛᴀɴᴛ ɴᴏᴛᴇ: ᴛʜᴇʀᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ɴᴏ 'ᴊᴀɪʟʙʀᴇᴀᴋꜱ' ᴏʀ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛɪɴɢ ᴏꜰ ᴀɴʏ ᴋɪɴᴅ ɪɴ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴀʀᴀᴄᴛᴇʀ ᴅᴇꜰɪɴɪᴛɪᴏɴ, ꜱᴏ ᴀꜱ ɴᴏᴛ ᴛᴏ ɪɴᴛᴇʀꜰᴇʀᴇ ᴡɪᴛʜ ᴀɴʏᴏɴᴇ'ꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴍᴘᴛ.

Nov. 26 update: Fixed things up to my liking, just like the original SoT bot. You know what's funny, is that this bot would have just been an extra opening message on my other SoT bot if that feature had existed then. XD but alas, that's not the case. I won't delete this one.

A blind date with the Sage? I wanted a scenario that gave you complete freedom in choosing who to play as! This is most definitely a fluff bot, though I guess you could change it into angst if you wanted to...but why would you?
Like my other Sage bot, he's based fully on the costume story. It also takes place in the little town from the story which is called Biscottea. Essentially the lady who owns the bakery in town set him up on a blind date, with YOU!

AnyPOV compatible. The only person mentioned by name in his card is Truthless Recluse, so if you have anything you want him to know about who you're playing as (that's not already in your persona), write it in the chat memory!

Tested with DeepSeek R1 0528<
creator: Banjogyro
